summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; unrelated non-security PRs are kept as independent backlog items because the artifact shows unique work but insufficient proof or merge readiness. Already-closed PR #71589 is left closed.

actions.reason: Security-boundary permission hardening work is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.
